task_description: Change the default chatbot/model setting to GPT-5.4-Mini and return to the main interface.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a vertical left sidebar with several monochrome icons. The semitransparent red X is centered on a gear-shaped settings icon, and a small dark tooltip beside it reads “设置,” indicating Settings. In the full-screen browser view, this is the Poe website homepage, with the same left navigation rail visible on the far left; the target is a UI control in the sidebar, not content on the main page.
caption.think: The user intends to open the Settings section from Poe’s left sidebar.
caption.action: Click the gear-shaped Settings icon labeled “设置” in the left sidebar.
caption.expectation: The Settings page or settings panel should open, and the interface should switch from the home view to settings-related options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a white dropdown field under the section label “默认应用,” with the semitransparent red X centered on the current selection text “Gemini-3.1-Pro.” This is a UI control, specifically a dropdown/select field rather than blank space or a canvas object. In the full-screen view, the Chrome browser is open to Poe’s Settings page (“设置”), on the “通用” tab, with account/contact settings above and device settings below; the clicked control is the default app selector in the main settings panel.
caption.think: The user likely wants to change or inspect the currently selected default app/model by opening the default app dropdown.
caption.action: Click the dropdown field showing “Gemini-3.1-Pro” under “默认应用.”
caption.expectation: The default app selector should become active and open a dropdown list of available app/model options for selection.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a centered white modal dialog titled “选择默认机器人” with a vertical list of selectable bots/apps. Visible entries include “Assistant” with a purple robot-face icon, “Script-Bot-Creator” with a blue code-slash icon, “App-Creator” with a blue layered-diamond icon, “Claude-Opus-4.6” with an orange starburst icon, and “Nano-Banana-2” with a yellow four-point shape. A thin scrollbar inside the modal is positioned partway down, indicating the list can scroll further. The full-screen view shows this modal over Poe’s Settings page in Chrome, with the background dimmed and the settings page behind it inactive.
caption.think: The user has opened the default bot/app selector and now wants to browse further down the available options within this modal list rather than interact with the background page.
caption.action: Scroll down inside the “选择默认机器人” modal list to reveal more available bot/app options below the currently visible entries.
caption.expectation: The list inside the modal should move downward, showing additional default bot/app choices further down the selector.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the top list item inside the white selection modal, with a semitransparent red X centered over the descriptive text of “GPT-5.4-Mini.” This row includes the OpenAI swirl logo in a rounded square on the left, the bold model name “GPT-5.4-Mini,” smaller Chinese description text underneath, and a small “官方” label. The row is outlined with a blue border, indicating it is the currently hovered or focused selectable item. In the full-screen view, this is a modal dialog over Poe’s Settings page in Chrome, with the background dimmed; the click target is a list item control inside the model/app picker, not the page behind it.
caption.think: After scrolling the default app list, the user likely wants to choose GPT-5.4-Mini as the default application/model from the modal.
caption.action: Click the “GPT-5.4-Mini” list item in the modal.
caption.expectation: The item should be selected as the default app/model, and the modal will likely close or update to reflect GPT-5.4-Mini as the chosen setting.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the small Poe chatbot face logo at the top of the left vertical sidebar. This is a sidebar navigation icon inside a light gray square button, positioned above the hamburger menu icon, so the target is a UI control rather than blank space or content. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open to Poe’s Settings page with the “通用” tab selected, and the main panel already shows “GPT-5.4-Mini” as the chosen default app; the clicked element is the top-left Poe sidebar control.
caption.think: After selecting GPT-5.4-Mini as the default app, the user likely wants to leave Settings and return to Poe’s main area or home/chat navigation using the Poe logo button in the sidebar.
caption.action: Click the Poe chatbot face logo button at the top of the left sidebar.
caption.expectation: The Poe logo button should become active, and the interface should navigate away from the current Settings view to Poe’s main/home area or another primary navigation page.
